<!-- AUTOGENERATED by scripts/gen-readmes.sh — edit scenarios.tsv -->
# Apache HTTPD (HTTP) — servlet-mapping-push-url

servlet-mapping with PUSH relocated to /VAADIN/push.

Proxy URL on `http://localhost:9090`: `/ui/`

## Configuration

See [docker-compose.yml](./docker-compose.yml) for service definitions.

Apache HTTPD config (`vaadin.conf`):

```apache
# Hilla resources (/HILLA/* push and /connect/* browser-callables) live at the
# backend's context root regardless of vaadin.url-mapping. See vaadin/hilla#289

ProxyPass        "/ui/HILLA/push"              ws://vaadin:8080/HILLA/push
ProxyPass        "/ui/VAADIN/push"             ws://vaadin:8080/ui/VAADIN/push
ProxyPassMatch   "^/ui/(HILLA|connect)/(.*)$"  http://vaadin:8080/$1/$2
ProxyPass        "/"                           http://vaadin:8080/

ProxyPassReverse "/ui/HILLA/"                  http://vaadin:8080/HILLA/
ProxyPassReverse "/ui/connect/"                http://vaadin:8080/connect/
ProxyPassReverse "/"                           http://vaadin:8080/
```
